assertion_results.evidence: Every task in the plan is fully concrete: Task 1 gives exact CLI commands and filenames to delete; Task 2 provides the complete TypeScript interface; Task 3 specifies exact state shape, API signatures, and side-effect behavior; Tasks 4–6 give exact prop types, rendered element structure, and CSS class names; Task 7 specifies exact destructuring and JSX structure; Task 8 gives exact CSS property values. The tests section lists specific test cases per component. No 'TBD', 'TODO', 'later', 'if needed', or any other placeholder appears anywhere in the final_message.

**REQUIRED NEXT SKILL:** `slow-powers:test-driven-development`

This plan adds runtime behavior, so TDD governs the implementation phase.
